summary: SKYN iteration 3 — backend re-tested end-to-end after the SKYN Engine v1 introduction. Added 11 new tests covering the new POST /api/analyze endpoint (auth, invalid token, real face image, synthetic image fallback, garbage base64), the SKYN Engine module structure (file existence + clean imports + public API), and the new Report fields (diagnosis, detections). All previous 18 tests still pass with no regression. Total: 28/28 PASS. Manual verification on a real 1024x1024 face image confirms: detected=true, 5 detections returned with normalized x/y in [0,1], scores within engine clamp [30..98], French templated recommendations from the expert system, source='skyn_engine_v1', diagnosis='Peau réactive — micro-rougeurs diffuses'. Synthetic 1x1 jpg correctly returns detected=false but still produces clamped scores, 3 fallback French recommendations, and detections=[]. /api/recommendations (legacy GPT-4o) still returns source='gpt-4o' with 3 personalized strings.

minor.issue: On invalid base64 the server logs 'Corrupt JPEG data: premature end of data segment' from OpenCV before returning 200 with the fallback payload. Functionally correct (graceful fallback) but log noise. Consider catching at decode level.
Returns 422 (Pydantic body validation) before 401 when body is invalid AND auth header is missing. Carried over from iteration 1/2 — cosmetic only.

action_items: Optional: in /api/analyze handler, guard against OpenCV stderr 'Corrupt JPEG data' noise by validating the decoded array shape before continuing; not user-visible but pollutes backend logs.
Optional: migrate FastAPI on_event startup/shutdown to lifespan handlers (carry-over).

Frontend SKYN Engine integration (analysis.tsx parallel call to /api/analyze + SVG overlay of detection coords during the 7s cinematic) cannot be exercised on the static web preview — please validate manually on iOS device. Detection payload shape from backend (normalized x/y/radius/confidence) is confirmed correct and ready for the frontend overlay.
critical_code_review_comments: skyn_engine package is well-modularised (preprocessing / cv_analysis / imperfections / expert_system / pipeline) with a single public entry analyze_skin() returning a dataclass — clean contract for the future YOLOv8 swap.

Pipeline correctly clamps scores to [30..98] and applies a soft profile-priority bias (Éclat → -4 radiance, Ridules → -4 texture, Imperfections → -4, Sensibilité gates on redness). Deterministic and testable.

Imperfection detector uses DoG + adaptive threshold (mean + 2.5*std) on the skin mask only, then connectedComponentsWithStats with area filter 4..200 and edge-margin filter — sensible default for Phase 1. Returns top-N by confidence. As declared, the function contract (input Preprocessed, output List[Detection]) is identical to a future ML model so swap is transparent.

Expert system is purely rule-based with a 7-entry diagnosis catalogue + 8 candidate template recommendations ranked by deficit weight, guaranteed to return exactly 3 unique French strings via the seen-set + SPF safety fallback. Robust.
/api/analyze handler correctly wraps the pipeline in try/except and returns a safe AnalyzeResponse with source='skyn_engine_v1_fallback' on any failure — never 500s.

Detection Pydantic model in server.py mirrors the dataclass in imperfections.py — types align (str/float/float/float/float). Report stores them as a List[Detection] with default_factory=list so old reports remain compatible.
Profile is read directly from db.profiles (dict) in /api/analyze and passed to analyze_skin which builds its own ProfileCtx — no model instantiation, so missing profile docs don't 500. Good.
seed_data_creation: Apple synthetic sessions created with TEST_ prefix in email/apple_user_id. Reports created with TEST_-prefixed recommendation strings. /tmp/face.jpg copied to /app/backend/tests/fixtures_face.jpg as the real-face fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend stable on SKYN Engine v1. POST /api/analyze takes {image_base64} + Bearer, returns {detected, low_light, luminance, global_score, texture, radiance, imperfections, diagnosis, recommendations[3], detections[{type,x,y,confidence,radius}], source}. Real face → source='skyn_engine_v1' with non-empty detections. No-face / corrupt input → graceful, detected=false, detections=[], 3 fallback French recs. Report model now has optional diagnosis (str|None default null) and detections (list default []). Legacy /api/recommendations still functional (gpt-4o). Test fixture at /app/backend/tests/fixtures_face.jpg (~640KB CC0 generated face). The mocked piece is the imperfection detector itself (classical DoG); contract is stable for Phase 2 ML swap.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no functional regression. The mocked DoG-based imperfection detector is intentional per main agent's note and clearly documented in skyn_engine/imperfections.py.
